gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reviewer reported no findings and approved the corrected JSONL diagnostics behavior, including physical line reporting, logical ID stability, and limit short-circuiting.
verification: python -m pytest tests/test_benchmark_runner.py tests/test_dataset_prep.py; python -m pytest tests/test_public_package.py tests/test_project_governance.py::test_repository_directories_have_readme_or_package_docstring -q; python -m pytest -q; poetry check; poetry install --dry-run; poetry install --dry-run --extras databricks --extras test; poetry build; git diff --check; GPT-5.5 review approved with no findings after earlier issues were fixed.
what_changed: V1 benchmark JSONL loading now reports physical source line numbers for invalid JSON and malformed rows, preserves logical record indexes for fallback example IDs, and avoids parsing rows beyond limit.
why: Makes Biography, HotpotQA, MusiQue, and NIAH AWS g5/Qwen3 benchmark failures traceable to source dataset lines without changing accepted benchmark schemas.
